arts.ttl: Tella all smiles after scoring Leverkusen's winner against Bayern
arts.sum: Nathan Tella was naturally delighted after scoring Bayer Leverkusen's winner against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Kompany disappointed after defeat to Leverkusen: "It's very, very bitter"
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany was visibly disappointed after his side's defeat against Bayer Leverkusen, but was proud of the way his team performed with 10 men.

arts.ttl: Holders Leverkusen knock 10-man Bayern out of German Cup
arts.sum: German Cup holders Bayer Leverkusen progress to the quarter-finals as they narrowly beat 10-man Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen dump Bayern out of the German Cup
arts.sum: Holders Bayer Leverkusen scored against the run of play through Nathan Tella in the second half to beat 10-man hosts Bayern Munich 1-0 on Tuesday and advance to the German Cup quarterfinals.

arts.ttl: DFB POKAL PLAYER RATINGS | Bayern Munich 0-1 Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: DFB Pokal holders Bayer Leverkusen beat 10-man Bayern Munich 1-0 to knock the hosts out at the round of 16 stage. The game was tense from the very beginning, Edmond…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund at the FIFA Club World Cup 2025: possible opponents
arts.sum: Germany's record champions have been placed in pot 1 for the draw, meaning they cannot face Manchester City (ENG), Real Madrid (ESP), PSG (FRA), Flamengo (BRA), Palmeiras (BRA), River Plate (ARG) or Fluminense (BRA) until the knockout rounds Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund will learn who they will face in the group stage of the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 at a draw ceremony in Miami, Florida on Thursday (7pm CET).

arts.ttl: Neuer sees red as Leverkusen dump Bayern out of DFB-Pokal
arts.sum: Manuel Neuer received an early red card as Bayern Munich crashed out of the DFB-Pokal with a 0-1 defeat to holders Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Sané avoids suspension after elbow against Dortmund
arts.sum: Leroy Sané will not be suspended for elbowing Pascal Gross against Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich hires new scouts
arts.sum: As recent additions (according to a report from Florian Plettenburg captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern has hired two new scouts: André Hechelmann and Christoph Kresse will move to the scouting department of FC Bayern.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Red card to Bayern Munich’s Manuel Neuer changes course of DFB-Pokal battle with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: In the 17th minute, Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer inexplicably — and recklessly — barreled into Bayer Leverkusen’s Jeremie Frimpong just outside the box to earn a red card and throw the entire match into disarray for the Bavarians: MANUEL NEUER RECEIVES HIS FIRST EVER RED CARD FOR CLUB OR COUNTRY FOR THIS HIT HE LAID ON JEREMIE FRIMPONG pic.twitter.com/aq3XbDvQYM
